news.headline: CEO allegedly cost investors $661M, claims Trump's pardon.
CIIE boosts global promotion with events in 9 countries, including Laos, Thailand, Vietnam, Sweden, Italy, Malta.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Shanghai, three delegations representing the China International Import Expo (CIIE) initiated a campaign to raise awareness and encourage participation in the 8th CIIE. The promotional events took place in nine countries including Laos, Thailand, Vietnam, Sweden, Italy, and Malta. This initiative was part of a global effort to attract a larger number of exhibitors and attendees to the upcoming expo.

news.headline: Vice Admiral Colin J. Kilrain joins Constellis Board of Directors, a risk management service, with 40 years of military experience.
news.summary: Constellis, a top provider of risk management and mission support services, disclosed on March 28, 2025, that Vice Admiral Colin J. Kilrain, USN (Ret.), has become a part of its Board of Directors. With almost 40 years of service, Vice Admiral Kilrain is a highly decorated military leader.

news.headline: Entrepreneur opens Blo Blow Dry Bar in Austin, brings premier beauty services. Debuts in Goodnight Ranch, offering founders rate for Mane Squeeze Membership.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from AUSTIN, Texas, it was revealed that Blo Blow Dry Bar, the original blow dry bar franchise in North America, has launched its latest bar in Goodnight Ranch. The franchise introduced a special Founders Rate for membership in the Mane Squeeze program. This new location marks a significant expansion for Blo Blow Dry Bar in the region. The debut event took place on March 28, 2025, showcasing the franchise's commitment to providing professional blow dry services to customers. This move signifies the growing presence of the franchise, bringing its total number of bars to a substantial figure.

news.headline: Nasdaq applies to SEC for Grayscale’s Avalanche ETF listing. $1.76M assets. Grayscale expands crypto offerings. BTC ETF sees $21B outflow. Eth ETF fees range 0.15%-1.5%.
news.summary: Nasdaq has filed with the SEC to list Grayscale Investments’ Grayscale Avalanche Trust (AVAX) spot ETF, a conversion of their close-ended AVAX fund. The filing on March 27 seeks rule change for listing. The current assets under management are $1.76 million, with a net asset value per share of $10.86 for 0.49 AVAX per share. The fund's market price is at a 7.4% premium to its underlying assets. Grayscale has various crypto products awaiting approval, including XRP spot ETF and Cardano ETF. In 2024, Grayscale announced the conversion of part of its Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs into spinoff products with lower fees. The Grayscale Bitcoin Trust has faced withdrawals totaling over $21 billion. GBTC has a management fee of 1.5% per annum, while competitor ETFs range from 0.15% to 0.25%. The situation with Ethereum ETFs is similar, with fees not exceeding 0.25%.

news.headline: Forbes cover features Justin Sun, TRON founder and HTX Global Advisor, 2nd Chinese entrepreneur after Jack Ma.
news.summary: In Singapore on March 28, 2025, Justin Sun, the Global Advisor of HTX and the Founder of TRON, was celebrated as the cover story on Forbes digital assets. This recognition represents a major achievement in the blockchain sector. Sun joins the ranks of Jack Ma as the second Chinese entrepreneur to receive this honor.

news.headline: Embedded Finance Market to reach $251.5 billion by 2029, dominated by Plaid, Inc. (US) & Klarna Bank AB (Sweden). Major players include Stripe, PayPal, Amazon, FIS, Visa, among others. Market driven by digitization of financial services & opportunities for financial inclusion and empowering businesses. Restraints include data privacy concerns & regulatory compliance.
news.summary: The embedded finance market is booming, estimated at USD 115.8 billion in 2024 and projected to reach USD 251.5 billion by 2029, with a CAGR of 16.8%. This growth is driven by advanced technologies like API, AI, and blockchain. Companies across various industries are incorporating financial services into their platforms to provide real-time, unique solutions, ranging from banking to payment services. This shift strengthens customer relations and boosts revenues. While there are concerns like data privacy and regulatory compliance, the market presents opportunities for financial inclusion and empowering businesses. Key players in this market include Stripe, PayPal, Amazon, and Visa. The market dynamics, segmented details, and potential business implications can be found in the detailed report by MarketsandMarkets™.

news.headline: FDA accepts Liquidia's NDA resubmission for YUTREPIA™ (treprostinil) inhalation powder.
news.summary: The FDA has officially acknowledged the resubmission of the New Drug Application for YUTREPIA™ (treprostinil) inhalation powder in the United States.

news.headline: Executive Home Care hosted 2025 National Conference in Princeton, NJ with Elevate Leadership Summit from March 26-27.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Executive Home Care, a leading provider of in-home care services and a part of Evive Brands, held its 2025 National Conference, known as the Elevate Leadership Summit. The summit took place from March 26-27 at The Westin Princeton at Forrestal Village in Princeton, New Jersey.

news.headline: Embassy Group launches GCC platform 'EMBARK' for global capability centers in India on March 28, 2025.
news.summary: Embassy Group, a prominent developer in India's real estate and business sector, has introduced Embark, the nation's inaugural comprehensive solution for creating and expanding Global Capability Centers in India. The announcement was made in Bengaluru on March 28, 2025. Embassy Group is recognized for its expertise in these sectors and is now providing a groundbreaking service tailored for establishing and growing such centers in the country. This launch marks a significant milestone in the industry, offering a one-of-a-kind opportunity for organizations looking to set up or expand their presence. Embark by Embassy Group is set to revolutionize the process with its innovative approach and cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Pyxis Tankers files Form 20-F for 2024, available on website, shareholders can request hard copy.
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, Pyxis Tankers Inc., a global shipping company, revealed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Stakeholders can view this report on the company's official website, www.pyxistankers.com. Additionally, interested parties have the option to request a physical copy of the annual report, inclusive of audited financial statements, at no cost. Contact information for such requests is available at the conclusion of the provided press release. Pyxis Tankers Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ Capital Markets under the ticker symbol PXS.

news.headline: The ONE Group opens new Benihana in San Mateo at Bridgepointe Shopping Center - its fifth in Bay Area.
news.summary: A new Benihana location has been opened by The ONE Group Hospitality, Inc. at the Bridgepointe Shopping Center in San Mateo, California. This marks the company's fifth Benihana and sixth overall location in the Bay Area, located at 2204 Bridgepointe Parkway. The expansion strengthens the company's footprint in Northern California. The opening of this company-owned restaurant signifies their commitment to growth and presence in the region.

news.headline: CPG, Wine & Spirits Vet Seth Kaufman joins PMI U.S. as Chief Commercial Officer as Company expands smoke-free portfolio.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, PMI U.S. has appointed Seth Kaufman as its new U.S. chief commercial officer. The company aims to enhance public health by offering smoke-free options to legal-age nicotine users. Kaufman, a seasoned professional in the consumer packaged goods sector, particularly in wine and spirits, will oversee the commercial strategy for smoke-free items. This includes ZYN nicotine pouches, General snus, and the IQOS heat-not-burn device. He will be reporting directly to PMI U.S.

news.headline: Braze, Inc. (NASDAQ:BRZE) surpassed Q4 expectations with earnings of 12 cents/share and revenue of $160.4 million. Analysts raise forecasts post results.
news.summary: Braze, Inc. (NASDAQ: BRZE) exceeded expectations with its fourth-quarter results. They reported earnings of 12 cents per share, surpassing the estimated five cents per share. Additionally, their quarterly revenue reached $160.4 million, beating the expected $155.72 million. The company highlighted significant growth and product advancements in fiscal 2025, emphasizing investments in AI and machine learning. Braze saw a 26% revenue increase and notable operating leverage. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Altasciences wins 2025 CDMO Leadership Award in Small Molecule Dosage Form category. Proud to support drug development with FDA-inspected facility.
news.summary: Altasciences, based in LAVAL, Québec, has been honored with a 2025 CDMO Leadership Award in the Small Molecule Dosage Form–North America category. This prestigious award adds to their collection of nine CRO Leadership Awards. Altasciences' CDMO site provides essential support for drug development through services such as formulation, manufacturing, and analytical testing across all stages from discovery to commercialization. Their facility, which is inspected by the FDA, is equipped with Grade C cleanrooms, R&D and analytical laboratories, ICH stability chambers, and a cGMP warehouse.

news.headline: EU to offer concessions in a 'term sheet' for Trump tariff negotiations. No. of concessions undisclosed.

Taylor Devices, Inc. reports Q3 sales at $10.5M, down from prior year's $12.3M. Net earnings for Q3 were $2M. Nine-month sales at $30.7M, down from $32.5M last year. Net earnings for nine months totaling $5.7M, lower than $6.5M last year. CEO mentions favorable gross margins despite lower sales volume.
news.summary: Taylor Devices, Inc. reported a decrease in sales for the 3rd quarter of 2025, with sales totaling $10,564,834 compared to $12,254,093 in the same quarter last year. The company's sales for the 1st nine months of the year were $30,731,571, down from $32,517,596 in the previous year. Net earnings for the 3rd quarter were $2,002,245, a decrease from $2,696,921 in the prior year, while net earnings for the 1st nine months were $5,725,060, down from $6,526,132. Despite the decline in sales and earnings, CEO Tim Sopko highlighted the team's efforts in continuous improvements and favorable gross margins. The company faced challenges due to various factors impacting sales volume.

news.headline: Lululemon Athletica beats Q4 estimates with $3.61B revenue, $6.14 EPS. Forecasts $11.15-11.3B revenue for full year 2025.
news.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc (NASDAQ:LULU) announced impressive financial results for the fourth quarter, surpassing expectations. The company reported fourth-quarter revenue totaling $3.61 billion, exceeding the consensus estimate of $3.57 billion. Additionally, fourth-quarter earnings stood at $6.14 per share, outperforming analyst projections of $5.85 per share as reported by Benzinga Pro. CEO Calvin McDonald expressed satisfaction with the results, attributing the success to the introduction of new and innovative products. Looking ahead to 2025, Lululemon anticipates full-year revenue in the range of $11.15 billion to $11.3 billion, slightly lower than the estimated $11.301 billion. The company remains committed to its Power of Three ×2 growth plan, aiming to offer a compelling lineup of innovations and brand activations to its customers and communities.

news.headline: Brazil's Haddad: US-Brazil trade ties are strong, there is no reason for tariff fight.
XTI Aerospace priced 2,941,200 shares in public offering - March 28, 2025. #XTIA #Aerospace #Offering
news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Englewood, Colorado, XTI Aerospace, Inc. (Nasdaq: XTIA), a leading advanced aircraft design company, disclosed the details of its recent public offering. The offering comprised 2,941,200 shares of common stock or pre-funded warrants. This move is seen as significant for XTI as it aims to bolster its financial standing and potentially fund future projects in the aviation sector.

news.headline: Jim Cramer criticizes free trade, supports tariffs due to small town devastation in the US. He calls free trade embarrassing, costly for the country.
news.summary: Jim Cramer, the host of “Mad Money,” recently criticized free trade, attributing its practice to the devastation of small towns across the United States. Speaking on his popular TV show on CNBC, Cramer expressed his strong disapproval of free trade and revealed his pro-tariff stance. He highlighted the detrimental impact of free trade on smaller communities, stating that it has been an embarrassment for the country, costing fortunes and subjecting the nation to criticism. Cramer's comments have sparked conversation about the consequences of free trade policies on local economies.

news.headline: High Science TV chosen for "SeriesFest: Season 11" among six unscripted pilot series. Cannabis docuseries to be featured at Denver TV festival April 29 - May 4, 2025.
news.summary: A revolutionary docuseries called High Science, focusing on the cannabis industry, will be showcased at an international television festival in Denver from April 29 to May 4, 2025. The series sheds light on the cannabis revolution and is set to be a standout feature at the event. The event will take place in SCOTTSDALE, Ariz., with the series receiving accolades for its innovative approach. High Science aims to bring attention to the burgeoning cannabis sector and has been well-received since its launch. This event marks a significant platform for the series, with numerous attendees expected to engage with its content.

news.headline: Jim Cramer suggests buying GRAIL, Inc. (NASDAQ:GRAL) with $20 target, supports Healthpeak Properties as a 'reasonable' REIT.
news.summary: During CNBC's "Mad Money Lightning Round," host Jim Cramer expressed enthusiasm for purchasing shares of GRAIL, Inc. (NASDAQ: GRAL), emphasizing his strong support for the stock. In a significant development, Morgan Stanley analyst Tejas Savant revised the price target for GRAL from $16 to $20 on March 18. Cramer was cautious about investing in Turkcell Iletisim Hizmetleri A.S. (NYSE: TKC), describing it as a risky proposition. On the earnings front, Turkcell reported a net profit of 23.52 billion Lira for FY, a notable increase from the previous year's profit of 18.13 billion Lira on February 27. When discussing Block, Inc. (NYSE: XYZ), Cramer recommended buying half of the shares at the current price and waiting to see if it drops below 53 to purchase more. Keefe, Bruyette & Woods analyst Vasundhara Govil upgraded Block from Market Perform to Outperform on March 18. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Legal firm Jenner & Block files lawsuit against Trump's order, aiming to halt it.
news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.8%. This decrease in unemployment has led to the creation of over 300,000 new jobs in various sectors. Additionally, the stock market has experienced a 10% increase in the past month, reaching an all-time high of 35,000 points. Experts attribute this growth to increased consumer spending and confidence in the economy. Overall, the positive economic indicators suggest a promising outlook for the country's financial health in the coming months.

news.headline: Enlight Renewable Energy Ltd. files Form 20-F for fiscal year ended Dec 31, 2024 with SEC. NASDAQ: ENLT, TASE: ENLT.
news.summary: Enlight Renewable Energy Ltd., based in Tel Aviv, Israel, revealed on March 28, 2025, that it submitted its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company's stocks, listed as NASDAQ: ENLT and TASE: ENLT, were part of this filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).

news.headline: Silynxcom to collaborate on AR communication solutions for aerospace market, aiming to integrate tactical expertise.
news.summary: Silynxcom has recently signed a non-binding memorandum of understanding to explore the potential of combining its tactical communications skills with augmented reality technology in order to meet the evolving requirements of the aerospace sector. This collaboration aims to leverage Silynxcom's expertise in tactical communications and merge it with augmented reality advances to cater to the needs of the aerospace industry. This move represents a strategic initiative by Silynxcom to adapt to the changing landscape of the aerospace industry. The memorandum signifies the intent to investigate the integration of these technologies, signaling a new direction for Silynxcom.

news.headline: Canadian home prices to rise 2.0% in 2025 and 3.4% in 2026 in 4.0% and 2.8% in December - Poll.
Verdek completes EV charging facility in Staten Island, NY, promoting sustainability.
news.summary: In Monroe, Conn., on March 28, 2025, a notable development has taken place in the bustling Charleston neighborhood of Staten Island. Verdek LLC has successfully finished an advanced EV charging setup in Staten Island, NY, marking a significant step towards sustainability. This installation is expected to play a transformative role in promoting the adoption of electric vehicles in the area.

news.headline: Putin extends Ruble gas payments to any Russian bank until July.
Ford releases 2025 proxy statement, sets virtual annual meeting for May 8 at 8:30am EST. Shareholders can attend online.
news.summary: Ford based in Dearborn, Michigan, revealed in a recent statement that their 2025 annual meeting of shareholders will be conducted virtually. Scheduled for Thursday, May 8 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, the meeting allows shareholders to participate in voting, submitting questions, and listening in by visiting www.virtualshareholdermeeting.com/FORD2025. The proxy statement for 2025 along with further information on the annual meeting are accessible in the “Reports & Filings” section.

news.headline: Novo Resources Corp. (ASX: NVO) changed shareholder registry services provider to Automic Pty Ltd on March 31, 2025.
news.summary: Novo Resources Corp. (ASX: NVO, TSX: NVO, OTCQX: NSRPF) based in Perth, Australia, has announced a change in shareholder registry services provider. As of March 31, 2025, the company has shifted from MUFG Pension & Market Services to Automic Pty Ltd. This transition will impact all shareholders and stakeholders involved with Novo, signaling a strategic move in managing shareholder data and records effectively.

news.headline: The EU Plans a 'Terms Sheet' of Concessions for Trump Tariff Talks
Texas AAPI communities unite against discriminatory alien land bills SB 17 and HB 17. Joining other ethnics against real estate bans for select foreign nationals.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on March 28, 2025, various ethnic communities, including Asian Pacific Americans, are coming together to oppose Texas Senate Bill 17 (SB 17) and House Bill 17 (HB 17). These bills aim to prohibit or limit real estate ownership for specific foreign individuals.

news.headline: Home support workers in Sydney, NS vote 99% in favor of a strike amid expired contract and 2 years of bargaining. Premier questioned.
news.summary: In Sydney, Nova Scotia, the home support workers at New Waterford Homecare Service Society have voted overwhelmingly in favor of job action, with 99% of the workers supporting a strike mandate. The decision follows almost two years of negotiations and four years without a valid contract. Concerns were raised about Premier Houston's commitment to healthcare improvements as the workers have been without a contract for the duration of his term. Jen, a representative, highlighted the uncertainty regarding the inclusion of Home Support in the promised healthcare reforms.

news.headline: EU plans concessions for Trump after reciprocal tariffs hit.
Bayport Management Ltd releases standalone annual financial statement for December 2024.
PitchBook announced 2024 Lending League Table Awards winners, recognizing most active lenders in PE deals globally.
news.summary: A leading data provider for private and public equity markets, PitchBook, revealed the recipients of the 2024 PitchBook Lending League Table Awards in Seattle. These awards highlight top lenders in private equity across various factors like geography, deal type, and sectors. The rankings also acknowledge the most active law firms in US PE debt deals. The awards are part of PitchBook’s annual program and aim to showcase the most active players in the industry. PitchBook's Global League Table Awards recognize excellence in the field.

news.headline: Ryan named one of Philippines Best Workplaces™ of 2025 by Great Place To Work® for outstanding work, culture.
news.summary: Ryan, a prominent global tax services and software provider, has been recognized as one of the Philippines Best Workplaces™ of 2025 by Great Place To Work® for the first time. This acknowledgement highlights the exceptional work culture established by the team members and the remarkable accomplishments made for clients. Ginny B. Kissling, President Americas and Chief Operating Officer, expressed excitement over the recognition, emphasizing the dedication and achievements of the team.

news.headline: Kay.ai raises $3M to automate data entry in insurance operations; aims to address 400,000-worker shortage by 2026.
news.summary: A company called Kay.ai, which offers AI assistance to insurance brokers and agencies, has recently secured $3 million in funding. The investment round was headed by Wing VC, along with contributions from South Park Commons, 101 Weston Labs, and a number of angel investors. CEO Vishal Rohra stated that the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics predicts a deficit of around 400,000 workers in the insurance sector by 2026. This funding aims to address the imminent talent shortage in the industry.

news.headline: Invest wisely: despite a shaky U.S. stock market, bonds and international stocks hold steady amidst White House uncertainty.
news.summary: Investors who have allocated their funds to bond and international stock investments have managed to remain stable amid the volatility in the U.S. stock market and the disruption stemming from the White House. This strategic move has allowed them to protect their portfolios and potentially minimize losses. The bond and international stock funds have proven to be resilient during this period of unpredictability, showcasing their reliability during times of turmoil. This diversification strategy has helped investors navigate the challenging market conditions, with bond funds typically yielding around 2-3% while international stock funds showing mixed results across different regions. Overall, those who diversified their portfolios with these funds have fared better in the current economic climate compared to those heavily invested in the domestic stock market.

news.headline: Elliott shorts Shell as BP activist campaign unfolds, Reuters reports.
Penny stock Lexicon Pharmaceuticals surges after securing $1 billion obesity pact with Novo Nordisk. Novo Nordisk gains exclusive license for LX9851.
news.summary: Lexicon Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:LXRX) saw an increase in its stock price on Friday following an exclusive licensing agreement with Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE:NVO). The agreement grants Novo Nordisk the rights to develop, manufacture, and market LX9851, a novel oral non-incretin drug for obesity and associated metabolic disorders, worldwide. Lexicon retains responsibility for finalizing the agreed-upon Investigational New Drug (IND) application. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bow Wow and Chris Brown release a summer anthem "Use Me," collaborating for a hit single destined to top playlists.
news.summary: Bow Wow and Chris Brown, renowned collaborators, have made a comeback with a summer anthem produced by Hitmaka. The highly-anticipated track is expected to dominate playlists, marking Bow Wow's resurgence after selling over 10 million albums with chart-topping hits such as "Let Me Hold You" and "Like You." The exciting news was announced in New York on March 28, 2025.

news.headline: Carnival Adventure and Carnival Encounter join Carnival's fleet, making it the top cruise operator in Australia with 29 ships.
news.summary: In a significant development for Carnival Cruise Line, the company has emerged as the top cruise operator in Australia, with a global fleet expanding to an unprecedented 29 ships. This announcement was made in Sydney on March 28, 2025. The specific ships contributing to this achievement are the Carnival Adventure and Carnival Encounter, reflecting a remarkable growth trajectory for the cruise operator.

news.headline: Atlas Cloud appoints Suzanne Rabicoff as Chief of Field to accelerate neocloud adoption for AI infrastructure.
news.summary: In New York on March 28, 2025, Atlas Cloud revealed the selection of Suzanne Rabicoff as the new Chief of Field. Rabicoff's appointment is part of the company's push to bolster its neocloud services, key to its specialized AI infrastructure solutions. This move is pivotal as Atlas Cloud aims to scale its operations, building on its reputation as a premier provider in the industry.

news.headline: Local Bounti (NYSE: LOCL) will release its full year 2024 financial results on March 31, 2025, in Hamilton, Montana.
news.summary: Hamilton, Montana on March 28, 2025 - Local Bounti Corporation (NYSE: LOCL), a leading indoor agriculture company in the U.S., revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, following market hours.

news.headline: Forter appoints Jim Lejeal as CFO and Cyndy Lobb as CPO to drive growth in the digital commerce sector.
news.summary: Announced on March 28, 2025, Forter, the Trust Platform for digital commerce, welcomed Jim Lejeal as the new chief financial officer and Cyndy Lobb as the chief product officer. The goal is to enhance revenue growth by adding these executives to the team.

news.headline: European Commission adopts CHMP opinion to not renew the authorization of PTC Therapeutics' Translarna.
news.summary: PTC Therapeutics, Inc. headquartered in Warren, N.J., revealed today that the European Commission has endorsed the decision of the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use of the European Medicines Agency to not extend the authorization for their medication. The company's stock, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol PTCT, experienced fluctuations following this announcement. This decision will impact the availability of the drug in European markets and may influence the company's financial performance in the near future.

news.headline: Lockin introduces Veno series smart locks with Venokey™, LockinCam™, LockinAI™ tech for top security. #1 globally.
news.summary: Lockin, a global leader in vein recognition technology based in West Hollywood, California, unveiled its latest innovation that combines Venokey™, LockinCam™, and LockinAI™ to provide comprehensive security solutions. The Veno series smart locks have taken the top position in the market, offering unmatched protection. The announcement was made on March 28, 2025, showcasing the cutting-edge technologies that are revolutionizing smart security systems. This advancement signifies a significant milestone in the industry, with Lockin leading the way with its integrated approach to safety.

news.headline: Hollyland to showcase audio-visual solutions at NAB Show 2025 in Las Vegas. Booths N572 and N2471 open April 5-9.
news.summary: A prominent audio-visual solutions provider, Hollyland, is poised to showcase its offerings at the upcoming NAB Show 2025 in Las Vegas happening from April 5 to 9. Attendees can visit booths N572 and N2471 to explore the latest products and technologies.
